title: Claude Custom Connector Explained  | Connect Your Own APIs & Apps
summary: Claude Custom Connectors allow direct integration of Claude with private APIs, databases, and internal tools beyond pre-built connectors. Users can authenticate and connect Claude to custom data sources for real-world applications in analytics, e-commerce, and internal business systems.
